title: MQWS Optimized MC
description: This modpack was made by me (mqws), trying to have the best FPS on weak pcs, and some cool mods, but this modpack is Vanilla Friendly, and I hope you like it :)
body:
Introducing **MQWS Optimized MC**, a meticulously crafted modpack designed to enhance the beauty and performance of your Minecraft experience. **Disclaimer: I do not own _any_ of the mods featured in this modpack.** (More information on this at the end of the description.)

Are you tired of sacrificing visual appeal for better performance or vice versa? Look no further! MQWS Optimized MC strikes the perfect balance by offering a handpicked selection of mods that not only elevate the aesthetic appeal of Minecraft but also optimize the game's performance.

With carefully curated mods focused on enhancing the game's visuals, you'll witness breathtaking landscapes, stunning textures, and immersive lighting effects that will transport you into a world of unparalleled beauty. Every detail, from vibrant biomes to intricately designed structures, has been carefully considered to create a visually captivating environment.

But it doesn't stop there! MQWS Optimized MC goes the extra mile by prioritizing performance optimization. Say goodbye to lag spikes and enjoy a smoother gameplay experience. The modpack incorporates a variety of performance-enhancing mods, optimizing resource usage and reducing unnecessary load on your system, allowing you to explore and build in Minecraft with ease.



Don't miss out on the chance to transform your Minecraft experience into a visually stunning and performance-optimized adventure.** Download now and let's embark on this extraordinary journey together!**


**IMPORTANT !**

**As mentioned earlier, it's important to note that _I am not the owner_ of any of the mods included in this modpack. Full credits and recognition go to the respective authors for their incredible creations.**

Please note that all credits for the mods featured in the MQWS Optimized MC modpack go to their respective authors. I do not claim ownership of any of the mods included in this modpack. Every mod in MQWS Optimized MC is the result of the hard work and dedication of talented individuals within the Minecraft modding community. Their creativity and innovation have made it possible to enhance the beauty and performance of Minecraft in extraordinary ways.

I would like to express my utmost gratitude to the mod authors for their incredible contributions. Without their expertise and passion, this modpack wouldn't be possible. They deserve all the recognition and appreciation for their outstanding creations. Please support these amazing mod authors by visiting their respective websites, downloading their mods, and following their projects. They continue to enrich the Minecraft community with their talent, and they deserve all the credit for their fantastic work.

**Thank you to the mod authors for allowing me to incorporate their mods into MQWS Optimized MC, and thank you to all the players and supporters who have joined me on this journey. Together, let's celebrate the beauty and performance of Minecraft with this incredible modpack.**
